issues.description: FlipLife is incorrect. The effect allows you to ADD (move) a card from Life to hand, not flip Life cards. Should use a custom action or clarify intent—FlipLife typically means converting Life cards to hand count, not selecting and moving specific cards.

TrashFromHand is incorrect. The effect says 'add up to 1 card from hand to the top of your Life cards'—this is moving a card back to Life, not trashing it. No DSL action directly models this; likely requires custom implementation.

thenActions array is empty but conditional logic is needed: first action (select from Life) should gate the second action (return card to Life). This is a two-step optional sequence, not a simple discard.
